creator: sean@rogue-research.com
text:
>The title says only node16.

Well it was probably newest at the time. :)

>If other ports are affected you can re-open this issue (and rename the title) or open a new issue.

Looking also at https://github.com/nodejs/node/issues/40467#issuecomment-1068322023 I suspect nothing is fixed yet.

>Do you have any information or issue about newer node ports?

I do not. But I have to set up a new jail for FreeBSD 14.2 anyway, so will try with w^x again there and ping this ticket in a few days...
